name: share
invariants: output.ok === true || typeof output.reason === 'string' || typeof output.error === 'string'
_note: photos.share mints a kind='photo' DTU + flips the photo's visibility to public so the royalty cascade fires when the photo is later cited. Owner-only: a missing photoId rejects missing_photoId; an unknown photo rejects no_photo; a photo owned by someone else rejects not_owner. The assassin's internal owner actor owns no photos, so an arbitrary photoId returns no_photo — never no_db. On success it returns the minted dtuId.
